nasb.text: But the people of the city were divided; and some sided with the Jews, and some with the apostles.

esv.text: But the people of the city were divided; some sided with the Jews and some with the apostles.

cnv.text: 城裡眾人就分裂了，有的附從猶太人，也有的附從使徒。

ccb.text: 城里的居民分成了两派，有些附和犹太人，有些支持使徒。

csbs.text: 以哥念城的民众就分裂了，有的赞同犹太人，有的赞同使徒们。
